task: Fix robots.txt duplicate wildcard block
description: robots.txt has two "User-agent: *" groups; the second contains only "Disallow: /". Per Google's own spec, groups sharing a user-agent are merged, so any crawler not explicitly named (ClaudeBot, GPTBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, Applebot, YandexBot, etc.) is blocked from the entire site.
expected_impact: High - blocks AI answer-engine crawlers and any non-major search engine from indexing any page
source_or_reason: [verified] robots.txt fetched 2026-07-08, two User-agent: * groups present, second is Disallow: /
